data.title: HashKey Considers IPO
data.description: According to Zhitong Finance, HASHKEY, Hong Kong's largest cryptocurrency exchange, is reportedly seeking an IPO to raise no more than US$500 million.

data.title: Flying Tulip officially announced its first public offering partnership with Impossible, and whitelist applications are now open.
data.description: Flying Tulip officially announced on X that Impossible will be the partner platform for the protocol's public offering. Details of the offering will be announced in the coming days, and applications for whitelisting are now open. Previously, Flying Tulip had completed $200 million in private funding and planned to raise an additional $800 million in public offerings at a $1 billion valuation to build a comprehensive platform integrating native stablecoins, lending, spot trading, contract trading, and on-chain insurance.

data.title: Here's What to Expect From Solana as Daily Transactions Fall Ahead of ETF Deadline
data.description:
Solana’s price action could be muted despite its ETF approval deadline, Decrypt was told, as its transactions fall 50% from their July peak.
source: https://decrypt.co/343760/solana-daily-transactions-fall-ahead-of-etf-deadline

data.title: Momentum launches on Buildpad and opens MMT community subscription
data.description: Momentum announced on the X platform that it will launch its MMT community subscription today on Buildpad. This community subscription program aims to raise $4.5 million, with a FDV of $350 million. For qualified early adopters, Momentum will offer a discounted FDV of $250 million. All tokens acquired through this round will be fully unlocked at the Token Generation Event (TGE), with no lock-up or vesting period required for community participants.

data.title: Macau Advances Digital Pataca Development with New Prototype
data.description:
Macau Monetary Authority moves forward with Digital Pataca, completing a prototype and aligning with regional CBDCs.
source: https://coincu.com/367794-macau-digital-pataca-prototype

data.title: LBank has launched PUP U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, LBank launched the PUP U-margined perpetual contract at 22:20 (SGT) on October 9, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50x.

data.title: El Salvador to Host Bitcoin Histórico Event in November
data.description: According to Foresight News, El Salvador's Bitcoin Office announced via a tweet that the country will host a Bitcoin event named Bitcoin Histórico. The event is scheduled to take place from November 12 to 13, 2025. This initiative is part of El Salvador's ongoing efforts to promote Bitcoin and integrate it into the country's financial system.

data.title: The crypto market fell across the board, with the Layer2 sector leading the decline by over 7%, and ETH falling below $4,400.
data.description: On October 10th, according to SoSoValue data, all sectors of the crypto market declined, with the Layer 2 sector leading the 24-hour decline, down 7.60%. Within the sector, Mantle (MNT), which had seen significant gains the previous day, fell 17.74%, while Zora (ZORA) bucked the trend, rising 50.76%. Furthermore, Ethereum (ETH) fell 2.21%, falling below $4,400. Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.69%, remaining above $120,000. In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 0.97% over the past 24 hours. Within the sector, Dash (DASH) bucked the trend with a sharp rise of 34.63%. The DeFi sector fell 2.25%, but MYX Finance (MYX) rose 6.58%. The Meme sector fell 2.47%, while Pump.fun (PUMP) fell 6.94%. The Layer 1 sector fell 2.88%, while Zcash (ZEC) bucked the trend and rose 31.61%. The CeFi sector fell 4.49%, while Binance Coin (BNB) fell 4.40%. The Crypto Sector Index, which reflects historical sector performance, shows that the ssiLayer 2, ssiCeFi, and ssiNFT indices fell 8.81%, 4.57%, and 3.66%, respectively.

data.title: The GMGN S9 Global Trading Competition kicks off today with a prize pool of $374,000
data.description: GMGN announced that the 9th Season Global Trading Competition (S 9) officially opened today with a total prize pool of US$374,000.

data.title: He Yi: I heard that BNB Chain will support other wallets and similar Meme Rush products in the future
data.description: Binance co-founder He Yi responded to community users on the X platform, saying: "Due to policy requirements, Binance currently does not serve Americans. Today, I heard that BNBchain will support similar Meme Rush products from other wallets in the future."

data.title: Fanable Secures $11.5 Million in Funding and Launches COLLECT Token Points Mining
data.description: According to Chainwire, the Web 3 collectibles platform Fanable (developed by Ethernal Labs) has secured $11.5 million in funding from investors including Michael Rubin's Fanatics, Ripple, Steel Perlot, Polygon, Borderless, and Morningstar. Fanable claims to have completed over 20,000 transactions and is experiencing 100% monthly growth, with funds to be used for platform iteration and global expansion. It has partnered with the Collect Foundation to launch COLLECT token point mining, which will be used for community rewards, trading incentives, and governance. Fanable has also partnered with Brinks to support the global buying and selling of Pokémon and other trading cards in both crypto and fiat currencies, across iOS, Android, and the web.

data.title: Aster: The second phase of the airdrop inspection page will be online at 21:00 today
data.description: According to an official announcement, Aster announced that the Phase 2 airdrop check page will be live at 9:00 PM today. Previously, Aster announced that it has added more flexibility for users to claim Genesis Phase 2 (S2) rewards: Option 1: Receive the ASTER airdrop as usual. Option 2: Full refund of S2 transaction fees. This will be treated as a zero-fee transaction.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 121,000 USDT with a 0.51% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 10, 2025, 02:54 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 121,000 USDT and is now trading at 120,960.890625 USDT, with a narrowed 0.51% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Fed's Daly: After the September rate cut, policy remains moderately tight
data.description: Fed Chairwoman Daly stated: "After the September rate cut, policy remains moderately tight. The Fed also expects to implement more rate cuts as part of its risk management strategy."

data.title: Aethir Launches Aethir RWA Capital, Backed by Tactical Compute and Other Institutions
data.description: Aethir, a decentralized GPU cloud network, announced the launch of Aethir RWA Capital. Backed by institutional and DeFi partners including Tactical Compute, Credit Coop, and StoryHunt, Aethir aims to bridge the gap between traditional credit infrastructure and decentralized staking mechanisms. The Aethir RWA Capital suite includes two core products: 1. RWA Equity Capital, which supports staking financing using staked, unvested, or liquid ATH tokens and expected GPU cash flows; and 2. RWA Liquidity Capital, a community-backed, cash flow-based financing using expected GPU rewards.

data.title: Binance Announces Walrus (WAL) HODLer Airdrop and Upcoming Listing
data.description: Binance has revealed the 50th project on the HODLer Airdrops page Walrus (WAL). Users who subscribed their BNB to Simple Earn (Flexible and/or Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields products from 2025-10-01 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-03 23:59 (UTC) will get the airdrops distribution. The HODLer Airdrops information is estimated to be available in 24 hours, and the new token will be distributed to users’ Spot Accounts at least 1 hour before trading starts.Binance will then list WAL at 2025-10-10 07:30 (UTC) and open trading against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY pairs. The seed tag will be applied to WAL.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $594 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $439 million of these liquidations, while short positions made up $155 million. Ethereum saw liquidations amounting to $160 million, and Bitcoin experienced $164 million in liquidations.

data.title: Tom Lee's fund analyst: Ethereum is expected to end its correction tomorrow and may fall to $4,200
data.description: This morning, Tom Lee retweeted Mark Newton, an analyst at his fund, regarding Ethereum's latest outlook. Mark Newton believes the recent crypto market pullback is nothing to worry about, predicting Ethereum will bottom out within the next 1-2 days before rebounding to $5,500. From September 25th to October 7th, ETH experienced a strong technical rally, followed by only a minor three-wave pullback. The correction is expected to end before October 11th, with a resumption of the upward trend. "ETH has now retraced 50% of its recent gains, but may continue to fall to the $4200-4220 area, which will be an excellent support area, after which ETH will turn around and rise again." It should be noted that although Mark Newton had made accurate predictions about Ethereum's trend many times before, on September 16, Mark Newton said, "ETH is not expected to fall below the previous low of $4233. It may fall back to $4418 or $4375 this weekend. We will use this weak market to buy on dips. ETH is expected to rise to $5500 before mid-October." But then Ethereum briefly plunged to $4054.

data.title: SunPump now supports Chinese Meme issuance and trading
data.description: According to official news, the SunPump platform now officially supports the issuance and trading of Chinese memes. This update means that Chinese creators can also conveniently create, issue, and trade meme tokens centered on Chinese narratives on SunPump, further expanding the diverse expression of meme culture.

data.title: Bitmine Withdraws Significant Ethereum Amount from BitGo
data.description: According to TechFlow, on October 10, blockchain analysis platform Lookonchain reported that Bitmine has withdrawn 23,823 Ethereum (ETH) from BitGo, valued at approximately $103.68 million. This transaction occurred five hours prior to the report. The movement of such a substantial amount of ETH has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community.
